title: Child Safety: MedlinePlus
content: Child Safety On this page Basics Summary Start Here Learn More Related Issues Specifics See, Play and Learn Videos and Tutorials Research Statistics and Research Journal Articles Resources No links available For You Children Patient Handouts Summary As parents, we want to keep our children safe from harm. Take steps to keep your children safe: Install the right child safety seat in your car Teach children how to cross the street safely Make sure they wear the right gear and equipment for sports Install and test smoke alarms Store medicines, cleaners and other dangerous substances in locked cabinets Babyproof your home Don't leave small children unattended Start Here First Aid and Safety (Nemours Foundation) Also in Spanish Related Issues Halloween Safety Tips: Costumes, Candy, and Colored Contact Lenses (Food and Drug Administration) Also in Spanish Novelty Makeup (Food and Drug Administration) Specifics Anchor It: Secure Furniture and TVs: Protect Children (Consumer Product Safety Commission) Also in Spanish Backpack Safety (Nemours Foundation) Also in Spanish Childproofing Your Home: 12 Safety Devices To Protect Your Children (Consumer Product Safety Commission) Childproofing Your House (American College of Emergency Physicians) Fireworks (Consumer Product Safety Commission) Playground Safety (For Parents) (Nemours Foundation) Winter Safety Tips (American Academy of Pediatrics) Also in Spanish Videos and Tutorials Red Cross Mobile Apps and Voice-Enabled Skills/Actions (American Red Cross) Statistics and Research Traffic-Related Pedestrian Injuries among Children in 2023 (Safe Kids Worldwide) Journal Articles References and abstracts from MEDLINE/PubMed (National Library of Medicine) Article: Developing a multidimensional pedagogical framework for safety education in early childhood:... Article: A scalable model for child road safety in low- and middle-income... Article: A multilayer, anisotropy-aware, age-dependent finite element framework for pin-skull indentation mechanics...
